$125 Million Home of Luminar CEO Gutted in LA Wildfires After Week of Gains for Company
data.description: The most expensive home in California's Pacific Palisades, owned by Luminar Technologies CEO Austin Russell, has been ravaged by the ongoing Los Angeles wildfires.
